title: Test-Driven Development (TDD) Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on the TDD development cycle.

questions.question: Regarding the TDD development cycle, what is the first step?
options: Writing the minimum amount of code

questions.question: Which of these is a key benefit of using TDD for your project development?
options: It helps catch bugs early in the development cycle and leads to more maintainable code
It makes your local machine faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories

questions.question: In the TDD 'Red, Green, Refactor' cycle, what does 'Refactor' involve?
options: Cleaning up and improving your code's quality without changing its functionality
